field. 

SHORT NAME: CVRD_DAYS 

LONG NAME: CVRD_DAYS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: 0–XXXXXX; may be negative 

COMMENT: Number of inpatient days covered by Medicaid. Other payers may also provide coverage; therefore, 
the total number of days actually covered may be higher than the value in this variable.
